title: Paperwork Causing AI Mission Lag as Startups Flag Funding, IP Concerns
description: The Centre has not yet signed formal agreements with at least five of the 12 startups selected under the IndiaAI Mission to be incentivised for building indigenous foundational artificial intelligence (AI) models, though they were chosen between eight and 12 months ago.

title: Australia's data centre dilemma: energy boom or bust?

content:

title: AI use surges globally but rich-poor divide widens, Microsoft says
description: Generative artificial intelligence is being used by 17.8 percent of the world's working-age population, but the gap between wealthy and developing nations continues to widen, according to a report published by Microsoft. title: How the FAA wants to use artificial intelligence
description: The agency’s new effort isn’t focused on “safety critical functions,” according to one participant.
content:
The AI-powered initiative is called the Strategic Management of Airspace Routing Trajectories, or SMART.
“To be very clear, SMART is not aimed at separating aircraft or doing any of those kind of safety critical functions,” said Todd Donovan, Thales’... [6080 chars]

title: AI-powered electrocardiogram detects early signs of heart failure
description: Interpreting relatively inexpensive electrocardiograms (ECGs) with an artificial intelligence (AI) algorithm accurately screened patients for a key precursor of heart failure in Kenya, a study led by UT Southwestern Medical Center researchers shows. The results, published in JAMA Cardiology, suggest AI-augmented ECG (AI-ECG) analysis could be a potential low-cost strategy for identifying patients who have underlying impairment in heart function.
content: Interpreting relatively inexpensive electrocardiograms (ECGs) with an artificial intelligence (AI) algorithm accurately screened patients for a key precursor of heart failure in Kenya, a study led by UT Southwestern Medical Center researchers shows. ... [3421 chars]

title: Technology can be advantage, shouldn't deprive independent thought: Andhra Chief Justice
description: Andhra Pradesh High Court Chief Justice Lisa Gill on Saturday said here that Artificial Intelligence should be used carefully, observing that technology should be an advantage but not a deprivation of independent thought process. The Ten Courts Building Complex in Rajamahendravaram was inaugurated by High Court Chief Justice Lisa Gill, a press release said.

description: US markets advanced on Friday, buoyed by stronger-than-expected job creations and a fresh surge in artificial intelligence-related stocks, despite Middle East tensions flaring up. The S&P 500 rose...

title: Legal and sovereignty questions
description: THE proposed Pax Silica project in New Clark City in Tarlac has drawn public attention due to its scale and implications. Initial reports describe a 4,000-acre site, or about 1,600 hectares, that will host an artificial intelligence (AI) industrial hub mainly from the United States. The project is presented as an economic initiative that will attract investments, generate employment, and place the Philippines within emerging technology supply chains. Special arrangements may be granted within the zone, including privileges for foreign entities. These features raise legal questions.
